title: Campus Cafe Renovation
transcript: Good morning everyone. Please be advised that the Campus Cafe will be closed for equipment upgrades this Saturday and Sunday. A temporary food truck will be available in the main courtyard from 11 AM to 3 PM on both days, offering sandwiches, salads, and hot drinks. Regular service will resume on Monday. We apologize for the short notice.

questions.stem: Why will the Campus Cafe be closed?
questions.explanation: The announcement states the cafe will be closed 'for equipment upgrades.'

questions.stem: What food options are available during the closure?
options: A food truck in the courtyard
questions.explanation: A 'temporary food truck will be available in the main courtyard.'
